name: BunRuntimeAvailability
tldr: Dev and CI build steps assume Bun is installed; production npm bundle targets Node.js 18+.

name: SingleSpecPerBranch
tldr: Branch inference assumes branches are named NNN-slug and contain a single spec.

name: GitAvailability
tldr: Branch-based spec inference assumes git is installed; silently fails if not available.

name: ClaudeAsDefaultEngine
tldr: relic init defaults to claude engine; assumes Claude Code is the primary AI agent.
